steps.title: Translate 20% as a fraction
steps.content: We're told 20% of the beads are blue. Since 20% equals $\frac{1}{5}$, finding 20% of 450 is the same as dividing 450 by 5.

steps.title: Calculate the number of blue beads
steps.content:
$$\frac{450}{5} = 90$$
This represents the blue-bead group only; the remaining beads are other colors and are not part of the requested count. That confirms A is correct.
